{{Infobox character
| name = Naru Saeya
| aliases = Saeya
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Path of Grasping Sky]], [[Wind aura|wind aura]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, [[Grasping Sky madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Ruler techniques]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Emperor's little sister, [[Underlord]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Blackflame Empire team}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, group with Lindon}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, [[Naru clan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Underlord]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Naru Saeya Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru]] Saeya, also known as Saeya, is the younger sister of [[Naru Huan]], [[the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. She is a tall and strikingly beautiful woman who possesses [[emerald]] wings associated with the [[Path of Grasping Sky]]. These wings are noted for being sleeker and faster than those typically found on her [[Path]]. As a practitioner of this [[Path]], she exhibits impressive wind [[aura]] attunement and highly developed senses, allowing her to detect movement in the air from great distances. In combat, she utilizes a [[sword]] made of shimmering, rainbow-colored light drawn from her [[soulspace]] and employs green madra to execute various techniques. Saeya is a skilled warrior who has distinguished herself in battle, notably fighting against two Underlords simultaneously during conflicts involving the [[Seishen Empire]]. Her combat style often involves high-speed aerial maneuvers and the use of wind to manipulate her surroundings or opponents. Beyond her martial capabilities, she is characterized by a determined and sometimes fierce temperament, though she can also be friendly. She has expressed significant interest in the exploits of others and has been known to advocate for the inclusion of talented individuals within the [[Blackflame Empire]].}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Saeya]] is [[the Emperor]]'s little sister.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Saeya]] was the youngest [[Underlord]] in the [[Empire]] before [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru]] Saeya is distinguished by her wings and the peacock feather fan she carries. These wings serve as the [[Goldsign]] of the [[Path of Grasping Sky]], and she also wears peacock feathers behind her ear. In combat, she utilizes wind [[aura]] and wields a rainbow sword. Furthermore, her senses are nearly as highly honed as those belonging to a member of the [[Arelius family]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] has wings and wears a fan of peacock feathers.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] has wings.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]]'s wings are the [[Goldsign]] of the [[Path of Grasping Sky]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] wears peacock feathers behind her ear.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] has senses almost as honed as someone from the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] uses wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] wields a rainbow sword.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Saeya]] was on the cloudship deck.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Saeya]] is the [[Emperor's sister]] and uses [[Grasping Sky madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru]] Saeya is a [[Naru woman]] who possesses an [[Iron body]] and functions as a concentration of wind madra. Characterized by [[emerald]] wings and peacock feathers behind one ear, she carries a locked [[sword]] which she holds defensively during combat. As a member of the [[Blackflame Empire]] team, she leads their march and utilizes green wind madra in battle. During her exploits, she was observed flying low to circle a tower of [[gold light]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya is a [[Naru woman]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] was sitting in a cycling position.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya possesses a locked [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] is a concentration of wind madra.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] has [[emerald]] wings and peacock feathers behind one ear.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya is [[Naru Saeya]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] leads the [[Blackflame Empire]] team's march.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] is part of the [[Blackflame team]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] is a character who uses green wind madra.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya holds her [[sword]] defensively.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naru Saeya]] is a character who flew low to circle a tower of [[gold light]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|While traveling with [[Lindon]] and their companions, [[Naru]] Saeya utilized her wind [[aura]] to float a large trunk and practiced her techniques by targeting flying [[dreadbeasts]]. During combat, she demonstrated her skill by sweeping an attack away with a gust of wind and employing [[Ruler techniques]] to strip logs. While fighting in the [[arena]], she engaged an [[Abyssal Palace priest]] using a broken rainbow sword. Appearing as a green blur in the air, she waited at the base of some stairs before flying upward, eventually landing on a corpse while covered in injuries. Although she survived the battle, [[Naru]] Saeya was left in need of support.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] has a brother.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] uses wind [[aura]] to float a large trunk.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] is part of the group with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Saeya uses flying [[dreadbeasts]] as targets for her techniques.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] swept an attack away with a gust of wind.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] uses [[Ruler techniques]] to strip logs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] was fighting an [[Abyssal Palace priest]] with a broken rainbow sword.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] was fighting in the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] is a former team member of [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] is a green blur in the air.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] waited at the bottom of the stairs before flying upwards.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] landed on a corpse and was covered in injuries.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] survived the battle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] needs support.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Saeya]] suggested [[the Emperor]] was pleased with [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Saeya has been talking about [[Yerin]]'s battles.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Saeya]] is part of the [[Naru clan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Saeya]] trained other Underlords from her [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Emperor's little sister was tall and strikingly beautiful, with smooth skin and a delicate face that had “inspired” any number of ambitious painters in the Empire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|"Saeya hasn’t stopped talking about your battles since she returned."<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
